creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 147961
Updated ocl-icd port, build tested with 9.x and 10.x on amd64 and i386

An updated version of the ocl-icd port, with many fixes to pet portlint. The build was tested on 9.x and 10.x amd64/i386.

Doesn't it need a pkg-message similar to the one from opencl-icd?
